subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted unto God! When the Morn of Guidance rose from the Most Exalted Horizon, it brought glad-tidings unto the righteous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب الی الله صبح هدی چون از افق اعلی طلوع نمود بشارتی بود ابرار را و
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @Quddus, @literal interpretation, @belief and denial, @suffering and imprisonment
